violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees food was stored with the restaurant food.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use containers were stored on the floor.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
